description.value:
Prerequisite: To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Horse tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Horse, you gain +4 bonus to Ride checks (competence).
description.summary: Summon Horse tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Horses; +4 bonus to Ride checks (competence) within 50 ft of summon.
